milestones.title: MeanVC Desktop App — Production-Ready
milestones.vision: Transform the MeanVC GUI scaffold into a fully working, polished desktop application. Strip all Flet context, consolidate the codebase to a single clean entry point, wire the inference engine to real models, build a professional PySide6 UI consistent in design and behaviour, and deliver end-to-end functionality: profile management with real embedding extraction, offline voice conversion, real-time microphone conversion, and speaker similarity analysis — all backed by the actual MeanVC inference pipeline.
success_criteria: python -m meanvc_gui.main launches with no import errors on macOS MPS and Linux CUDA
Zero Flet references in any tracked Python file
Single entry point (meanvc_gui/main.py), single theme module (meanvc_gui/components/theme.py)
DB lives at data/meanvc.db (project root data/)
Profile creation + audio upload + WavLM embedding extraction works end-to-end
Offline conversion produces a real non-empty wav file
Realtime conversion runs at RTF < 1.0 on CUDA/MPS
Speaker similarity returns real ECAPA cosine score, not 75.0
Settings page shows real asset status from disk
README accurately describes asset paths, launch command, and feature status

key_risks.risk: Engine model loading takes 15-30s on first call — may appear frozen
key_risks.whyItMatters: User sees blank screen; must show loading dialog during model load

key_risks.risk: WavLM OOM on Apple Silicon with long reference audio
key_risks.whyItMatters: Already capped at 10s in convert.py but profile_manager.py fix must carry same cap

key_risks.risk: Realtime sounddevice latency on macOS vs Linux differs significantly
key_risks.whyItMatters: Chunk size and buffer tuning may need platform branch

key_risks.risk: QCharts not available if PySide6-Addons not installed
key_risks.whyItMatters: Analysis and Realtime waveform pages crash on import; need graceful fallback

proof_strategy.riskOrUnknown: Engine stub wiring to real convert.py
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: CLI convert.py and engine.convert() both produce the same wav from the same inputs
profile_manager.add_audio() produces a non-zero .pt embedding file
RTF < 1.0 logged per chunk on CUDA/MPS

definition_of_done: No stub return values in any shipped code path
lsp diagnostics clean on all modified files
python -m meanvc_gui.main launches without errors on the developer machine
GSD PROJECT.md and KNOWLEDGE.md updated to reflect final state
milestones.requirement_coverage: R001-R014 all addressed. R001-R004 (profiles+offline) covered by S03-S05. R005-R007 (realtime) by S06. R008 (analysis) by S07. R009 (library) by S04. R010 (export/import) by S04. R011-R012 (asset check+download) by S08. R013-R014 (cross-platform, auto-device) by S01-S03.

tasks.description:
1. Implement Engine.calculate_similarity(file_a, file_b) → dict:
   - Load each file via torchaudio.load, resample to 16kHz, cap at 10s.
   - Run sv_model (ECAPA-TDNN via init_sv_model) to get [1,256] embeddings.
   - Cosine similarity = F.cosine_similarity(emb_a, emb_b).item(), mapped to 0-100.
   - Also compute: duration_a, duration_b, rms_a, rms_b (basic quality proxy).
   - Return: {similarity: float, duration_a: float, duration_b: float, quality_a: str, quality_b: str}
2. quality_a/b: 'Good' if rms > -30dBFS else 'Low' (simple threshold).
3. Engine must already be loaded; if not, load it.
4. SimilarityWorker(QThread) with finished(dict), error(str) signals.

decisions.decision: GUI framework selection — Flet vs PySide6
decisions.rationale: Implementation was completed in PySide6, not Flet as originally planned in D001. PySide6 offers richer widget set (QCharts for analysis, QMediaPlayer, native file dialogs), better realtime waveform control via QPainter, and more predictable threading via QThread/signals-slots. D001 Flet decision is superseded by this.
